artifact_summary: Configuration menu for Generator No.1 displaying operational timing parameters.
artifact_blurb: A software interface screenshot titled 'Generator Faceplate' presenting the configuration menu for 'Generator No.1'. The display details specific operational timing parameters, including 'Cold Restart Time Frame' and 'First Fault Restart Delay', with associated values expressed in minutes or seconds.
